emails.subject: Confirm Desk Group
emails.body: Confirm Desk Group Joe, As mentioned in my voice mail please advise as to whether the following individuals should to be included in the Group known as "Confirm Desk": Andrea Guillen Gordon Heaney Scott Tackett Laura Dewett Thanks. Cordially, Susan S. Bailey Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, Suite 3806A Houston, Texas 77002 Phone: (713) 853-4737 Fax: (713) 646-3490 E:mail: Susan.Bailey@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Confirm Desk Group
emails.body: Re: Confirm Desk Group Susan, I don't know who Laura Dewett is, but the other three are on "my" Confirm desk. We have a couple of new people starting next week, so I'll send you an updated list as soon as they're set up for e-mail access. Thanks, Joe Susan Bailey 03/12/2001 02:01 PM
